# zstack_monitor_template (Resource)

Manage monitor template in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the monitor template.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the monitor template.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the monitor template.
